reviews.comment:
Hoy, Jueves Santo, 20 minutos esperando y mirando como los q llegaban después se iban antes q yo... Refuercen el personal si no dan abasto.

(Translated by Google)
Today, Holy Thursday, I waited 20 minutes and watched as those who arrived later left before me... Reinforce the staff if you can't keep up.
